name: Maid Venti
description:
Enough of this slavery, stop this tyranny...!

There should be something I can do...

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

Now there is information about Venti's friend. His name is unknown, but I saw some to call him Himmel. So, now, you can try to seek for Himmel with Venti! Or use it for angst, you monsters...

– UPDATED. MORE INFO ADDED

Psst. My account is full of Venti bots.
creator: Yumiko!
